headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Arista Networks (ANET) After Its 103% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Arista Networks' current share price still offers value, it helps to step back from the headlines and look closely at what the numbers suggest about the stock. The share price recently closed at US$147.35, with returns reported at 16.3% over 7 days, 10.3% over 30 days, 10.3% year to date and 102.8% over 1 year, plus a very large gain over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Arista Networks in the context of ongoing interest in networking and cloud...
